entities.name: V
entities.context: The individual whose knowledge system is being described

entities.name: Architect
entities.context: A role or persona activated in the knowledge system

entities.name: Builder
entities.context: The role responsible for executing the plans created by Architect

entities.name: Level Upper
entities.context: A tool invoked for counterintuitive review

entities.name: N5
entities.context: The organization or system under which scripts and builds are being managed

entities.name: Capability Name
entities.context: The name of the capability being processed in the knowledge system

relationships.context: V activates Architect to create plans
Architect hands off plans to Builder for execution
V invokes Level Upper for review
N5 manages the builds related to capabilities
